content.text:
All 8 tests pass, including "should support negative coordinates". The current implementation already correctly handles negative coordinates because it uses string keys (`${x},${y}`) for cell identification rather than array indices, which works seamlessly with any integer coordinates.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No new code needed - existing implementation already supports negative coordinates
- Result: All 8 tests pass
- Approach: The implementation uses Map/Set with string keys derived from coordinates, which inherently supports any integer values including negatives. The blinker pattern at [-5,-5], [-5,-4], [-5,-3] correctly oscillates to [-6,-4], [-5,-4], [-4,-4].

Proceeding to Refactor phase.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-36-55_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts
